name: Creating a new account signs the member in and reaches the dashboard
description: A visitor opens the create-account page, registers with a fresh unique email, and is signed in and taken to the dashboard.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the create account page at /register
Enter the name Test Member into the name field

Enter a unique new email address into the email field, for example newmember.<random6>@atelier.test where <random6> is six random lowercase letters or digits you choose so the email has not been registered before
Enter the password NewMemberPass#2026 into the password field
Verify the member is signed in and on the dashboard: the heading 'Dashboard' is visible and the header shows a Sign out control
